name: Sopa De Albondigas (Meat Ball Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wilt the onion and garlic in oil.
2. Add tomato sauce and heat to boiling point.
3. Mix meat with rice, egg, mint, salt, and pepper; shape into small balls.
4. Drop the meatballs into the boiling broth.
5. Cover tightly and cook for 30 minutes.
